settings.caption: Our Team
settings.heading: Meet the People Behind Divine
settings.text: We're a passionate team of sourcing experts, quality specialists, and customer-first people who believe that what goes into your food matters just as much as the relationships behind it.

settings.title: Sourcing & Quality
settings.text:
Our sourcing team goes to the farms — literally. We build direct, long-term relationships with certified organic growers across Japan, India, Sri Lanka, and beyond. Every partnership is built on trust, fair trade, and a shared obsession with quality.

Email: sourcing@divineingredients.com

settings.title: Product Development
settings.text:
From ceremonial matcha to custom superfood blends, our product team works side-by-side with creators, chefs, and wellness brands to develop ingredients that actually live up to the hype. If it's not exceptional, it doesn't make the cut.

Email: products@divineingredients.com

settings.title: Customer Success
settings.text:
Whether you're placing your first order or your hundredth, our customer team is here to make the experience seamless. Questions, recommendations, wholesale setup — whatever you need, we're on it.

Email: hello@divineingredients.com

settings.caption: Sourcing
settings.heading: Global Farm Partnerships
settings.subheading: We travel to meet our growers face-to-face. From matcha fields in Uji, Japan to spice farms in Kerala, India — every relationship is built on trust, transparency, and mutual respect.

settings.caption: Quality
settings.heading: Lab-Tested Purity
settings.subheading: Every batch is independently tested for purity, potency, heavy metals, and allergens. We don't guess — we verify. Because facts matter more than marketing claims.

settings.caption: Community
settings.heading: Creators & Partners
settings.subheading: We work alongside café owners, wellness brands, recipe creators, and home cooks who share our belief that the best results come from the best ingredients. Their success drives everything we do.

settings.caption: Wholesale
settings.heading: Growing Together
settings.subheading: From small-batch kitchens to large-scale operations, we're proud to be the ingredient partner for businesses that refuse to compromise. Your growth is our growth.

settings.text: From a frustration with what was available to a trusted source for creators worldwide — here's how Divine Ingredients grew while staying true to what we believe: quality over everything, transparency always, and the people who use our ingredients matter just as much as the ingredients themselves.

settings.heading: Origins
settings.row_content:
It Started with a Problem

We wanted clean, traceable organic ingredients — and couldn't find them. Not the way we needed them. So we did what felt natural: we went straight to the source. Visited farms. Built relationships. And created the supply chain we wished had existed all along.

settings.heading: Growth
settings.row_content:
Word Got Around

Turns out, a lot of people were looking for the same thing. Chefs, café owners, wellness brands — they tried our matcha, our spices, our superfood powders, and kept coming back. We grew by being the brand people actually recommended to each other.

settings.heading: Quality
settings.row_content:
We Raised the Bar (Then Raised It Again)

We invested in independent lab testing for every single batch. Purity, potency, heavy metals, allergens — if it doesn't pass, it doesn't ship. Our USDA organic certification and zero-additive promise aren't marketing. They're the foundation.

settings.heading: Today
settings.row_content:
A Community That Keeps Growing

Today, Divine Ingredients is trusted by home cooks, professional chefs, wellness brands, and private label partners across North America and beyond. Our collection keeps expanding, but our standards don't budge. Same care, same integrity, same obsession with getting it right.
